brief_en: July 18, 2026: A relatively quiet day across frontier AI labs with no major new model releases or flagship announcements in the last 12 hours. Focus remains on ongoing rollouts of recent GPT-5.6, Claude updates, Muse Image, and Grok 4.5 from earlier in the week. Open-source players like Moonshot continue pushing large MoE models.
brief_zh: 2026年7月18日：前線AI實驗室相對平靜，過去12小時無重大新模型發布或旗艦公告。重點仍在本週稍早的GPT-5.6、Claude更新、Muse Image及Grok 4.5持續推出。開源玩家如Moonshot持續推動大型MoE模型。
